status.loading: Loading teams, standings, and recent schedule…

title: MLB Run-Differential Dashboard
subtitle: Fetches MLB Stats API in the browser to show schedules, standings, and blowout tendencies.

hero.purposeText: This page demonstrates reading the public MLB Stats API from the frontend: today's schedule and league standings, then classifying recent games by margin (1 run, 2 runs, more than 2). Extend it into the run-differential tool you had in mind.
hero.statusNote: Default scope: all MLB teams, today's schedule, last 30 completed games per team.

filters.title: Filters
filters.note: Filter by division, search team names, or adjust the “more than 2 runs” share threshold.

analysis.title: Team run-differential analysis
analysis.note: Last 30 completed games, split by 1-run, 2-run, and 3+ margins, flagged against your threshold.

schedule.title: Today's schedule
schedule.note: Today's MLB games and start times from the official schedule endpoint.

footer: Data source: MLB Stats API. Fetched directly from the public API in the browser.
